news.title: Rolling News
news.subtitle: Payment updates, configuration changes, and recharge reminders scroll here.

login.title: Sign in to continue
login.description: Authentication reuses the current backend login API. After signing in, you can select a recharge method and a preset amount.
login.accountPlaceholder: Enter your existing system account or email
login.helper: This frontend does not maintain a separate user system. It reuses the current backend authentication and payment APIs.

dashboard.title: Recharge Center
dashboard.description: Choose an enabled payment method and a preset recharge amount, review the fee summary, then create the recharge order.
dashboard.selectAmountHint: Preset recharge amounts come from this frontend project's .env file.
dashboard.selectionReady: After selecting both items, confirm to review the fee breakdown before the order is created.
dashboard.noCurrentOrder: There is no active recharge order yet. The latest order status will appear here after you create one.
dashboard.paymentHint: If the payment page has already been opened, complete it there and come back here to refresh the order status.
dashboard.unsupportedStripe: Embedded Stripe card checkout is not implemented in this standalone portal yet. Continue from the existing payment page if needed.
dashboard.recordsHint: Records are loaded from the existing order list API and filtered to recharge-type orders.

dialog.title: Confirm Recharge
dialog.description: Billing values come from the backend order detail. Payment starts only after you confirm.

errors.missingCredentials: Enter both account and password before signing in.
errors.loginFailed: Login failed. Please try again later.
errors.missingSelection: Choose both a payment method and a recharge amount first.
errors.orderFailed: Failed to create the recharge order.

slider.title: Slider Verification
slider.hint: Drag the puzzle piece into position
